fields.label: Choose portal
fields.helpText: This SQL dropdown feeds the read-only Grid Repeater below.

properties.optionsSql:
SELECT
  CAST(p.PortalID AS nvarchar(20)) AS Value,
  CONCAT('Portal ', p.PortalID, ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(pa.HTTPAlias, ''), '(no primary alias)')) AS Label
FROM dbo.Portals p
OUTER APPLY (
  SELECT TOP 1 HTTPAlias
  FROM dbo.PortalAlias
  WHERE PortalID = p.PortalID
  ORDER BY IsPrimary DESC, PortalAliasID
) pa
ORDER BY p.PortalID

fields.label: Portal page readonly grid
fields.helpText: Browse-only SQL grid. Change the portal above to reload data, but row edits are not saved.

columns.label: Target page
columns.optionsSql:
SELECT
  CAST(t.TabID AS nvarchar(20)) AS Value,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(t.TabPath, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF(t.Title, ''), t.TabName)) AS Label
FROM dbo.Tabs t
WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0
  AND t.PortalID = COALESCE(TRY_CONVERT(int, NULLIF(:portalId, '')), (SELECT MIN(PortalID) FROM dbo.Portals))
ORDER BY t.Level, t.TabOrder, t.TabID

widgetProps.emptyMessage: Choose a portal to browse DNN pages in read-only mode.
widgetProps.masterQuery:
SELECT
  t.TabID AS tabId,
  COALESCE(NULLIF(t.Title, ''), t.TabName) AS tabName,
  t.TabPath AS tabPath,
  t.Level AS tabLevel
FROM dbo.Tabs t
WHERE t.IsDeleted = 0
  AND t.PortalID = COALESCE(TRY_CONVERT(int, NULLIF(:portalId, '')), (SELECT MIN(PortalID) FROM dbo.Portals))
ORDER BY t.Level, t.TabOrder, t.TabID

_template.name: DNN Portal Tabs Grid Readonly Demo
_template.description: SQL dropdown portal selector cascades into a browse-only Grid Repeater. Rows can page and reload, but row edits and submit are disabled.
_template.author: MegaForm built-in sample
